title: Savory Green Dumplings
description: A twist on traditional German dumplings, infused with green peppers for added flavor and texture.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and salt.
Gradually add in the water, stirring with a wooden spoon until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk.
Place a tablespoon of diced green pepper onto the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-circle and press the edges together to seal.
Repeat with the remaining dough and filling.
In a large pot of boiling, salted water, cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Serve hot with your favorite German-inspired toppings.
